global.reglas_realismo: Realismo documental, luz natural de cocina, piel con textura real, sin retoque excesivo.
global.negative_prompt: blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, text artifacts, watermark, low quality, plastic skin, oversaturated

images.prompt: Photorealistic portrait of an Argentine woman around 40 years old, slightly overweight, standing in a humble home kitchen, holding a glass of rice water, natural daylight, candid documentary style, 9:16.
images.negative_prompt: blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, text artifacts, watermark, low quality, plastic skin, oversaturated

images.prompt: Same woman, keep identity 100% consistent with the reference, same face, same person, now looking slimmer and more deflated, wearing a burgundy dress, standing in front of a mirror, natural light, 9:16.
images.negative_prompt: blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, text artifacts, watermark, low quality, plastic skin, oversaturated

images.prompt: Close-up b-roll of a glass of cloudy rice water on a wooden kitchen counter, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, 9:16.
images.negative_prompt: blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, text artifacts, watermark, low quality, plastic skin, oversaturated

clips.video_prompt: Handheld selfie style, woman talks directly to camera in the kitchen, slight zoom in, natural light.
clips.dialogo: Pará dos segundos: esto me cambió la panza en serio.

clips.video_prompt: Woman in burgundy dress turns in front of the mirror showing a flatter belly, confident smile, soft light.
clips.dialogo: Mirá cómo me quedó después de tomarlo todas las mañanas.

clips.video_prompt: Woman shrugs skeptically, raises an eyebrow, talking to camera, kitchen background.
clips.dialogo: Yo también pensaba que era otro verso, te juro.

clips.video_prompt: Macro shot of rice water being stirred in a glass, slow motion, light catching the liquid.
clips.dialogo: El agua de arroz ayuda a desinflar y a sentirte liviana.

clips.video_prompt: Woman points finger at camera with a serious but friendly expression, kitchen background.
clips.dialogo: Ojo: no lo tomes de cualquier forma, hay un truco.

clips.video_prompt: Woman smiles and gestures inviting the viewer to tap, pointing down, bright friendly mood.
clips.dialogo: Hacé el quiz de 30 segundos y te digo cómo arrancar.

warnings: Se asumio formato 9:16 e idioma es-AR (vos) por defecto.
El clip 'warning' se marco FILMAR_REAL porque el brief indica grabarlo a mano.
